name: Fluffball
appearance: A small fluffy creature that looks like a bunny made of soft white clouds. Has large sparkly blue eyes, tiny pink nose, and long floppy ears that seem to float. Its body is round and puffy like a cotton ball. Small paws peek out from the fluffy cloud body. Leaves tiny sparkles when it moves.
special_ability: Can float on air currents and create small rainbow trails

action_descriptions.idle: Gentle floating bobbing motion with soft breathing, sparkles drifting lazily
action_descriptions.hop: Bouncy hopping movement with floppy ears bouncing, leaves rainbow trail
action_descriptions.float: Graceful floating through the air, body gently rotating, ears streaming behind
action_descriptions.wiggle_ears: Ears wiggle and twitch playfully while body stays still
action_descriptions.bounce: Energetic bouncing up and down with increasing height, sparkles flying
action_descriptions.sleep: Curled up on a small cloud, gentle breathing, ears drooped softly
action_descriptions.curious_look: Looking around with wide sparkling eyes, ears perked up, slight head tilts
